news.title: Hot off the Guild Wars 3 reveal, the long-running MMO series is getting its first-ever CCG in Mistbound
news.titleEN: Hot off the Guild Wars 3 reveal, the long-running MMO series is getting its first-ever CCG in Mistbound
news.desc: Guild Wars, the legendary MMO series from ArenaNet, somehow never expanded into the collectible card game (CCG) genre. This will soon change, however, as Mistbound: Guild Wars Card Game was just revealed. Read more
news.descEN: Guild Wars, the legendary MMO series from ArenaNet, somehow never expanded into the collectible card game (CCG) genre. This will soon change, however, as Mistbound: Guild Wars Card Game was just revealed. Read more

news.title: Doom soundtrack composer Bobby Prince dies aged 81
news.titleEN: Doom soundtrack composer Bobby Prince dies aged 81
news.desc: Robert Prince III – best known as Bobby Prince, the man behind the iconic score of the original Doom game – has died aged 81. Read more
news.descEN: Robert Prince III – best known as Bobby Prince, the man behind the iconic score of the original Doom game – has died aged 81. Read more

news.title: Battlefield 6's next update is bringing back a classic mechanic… from Call of Duty: Ghosts
news.titleEN: Battlefield 6's next update is bringing back a classic mechanic… from Call of Duty: Ghosts
news.desc: As with all previous Battlefield 6 seasons, Season 3 unfolds over three phases. The second phase of Season 3 kicked off last week, albeit with a large number of bugs and issues, and the next one will arrive 30th June. Read more
